zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev. John Howse於大約1568年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Howse24歲，母親Alice Hinton19歲。他於大約1588年與Alice Lloyd在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1610年在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇被列為anglican minister-vicar。他去世於1630年8月30日在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾享年63歲，埋葬在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev. John Howse于大约1568年出生在英国时，他的父亲Thomas Howse24岁，母亲Alice Hinton19岁。他于大约1588年与Alice Lloyd在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1610年在英国肯特易亞斯特維爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇被列为anglican minister-vicar。他去世于1630年8月30日在英国肯特易亞斯特維爾享年63岁，埋葬在英国肯特易亞斯特維爾聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Howse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: House
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name for someone employed ‘at the house’, from Middle English hous(e) (Old English hūs), probably a religious house such as a convent. In the Middle Ages the majority of the population lived in cottages or huts rather than houses.

English: perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English huse, a southwest dialect form of Old English hyse ‘place overgrown with (water) plants’, a derivative of Old English hos ‘(water) plant’. In modern English, the name might have been absorbed into Huss or Hose .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Rev. John Howse was born about 1568, in England, his father, Thomas Howse, was 24 and his mother, Alice Hinton, was 19. He married Alice Lloyd about 1588, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1610, his occupation is listed as anglican minister-vicar in St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England. He died on 30 August 1630, in Eastwell, Kent, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England.

fr.St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Englan: St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev. John Howse est né environ 1568, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Howse, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Hinton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Lloyd environ 1588, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1610, sa profession de son indiquée est anglican minister-vicar à St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 août 1630, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre.

de.St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Englan: St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Rev. John Howse um 1568 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Howse 24 und seine Mutter Alice Hinton 19. Er hat um 1588 in England Alice Lloyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1610 ist sein Beruf als anglican minister-vicar in St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. August 1630 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Eastwell, Kent, England und wurde in St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. John Howse è nato il circa 1568 nel England, il suo padre, Thomas Howse, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hinton, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Lloyd circa 1588, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1610, la sua occupazione è indicata come anglican minister-vicar nel St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England. Morì il 30 agosto 1630, nel Eastwell, Kent, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. John Howseが約1568年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Howseは24歳，母Alice Hintonは19歳であった。約1588年にイギリスでAlice Lloydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1610年，イギリスケントエアストウエルスト マリ'ス チャーチでの職業はanglican minister-vicarと記録されている。彼は1630年8月30日にイギリスケントエアストウエルで63歳で死去し，イギリスケントエアストウエルスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Englan: 영국 켄트 이스트웰 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Rev. John Howse(이)가 대략 1568년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Howse(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hinton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1588년 영국에서 Alice Lloyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1610년, 그의 직업은 영국 켄트 이스트웰 스트 마이'스 처르치에서 anglican minister-vicar이었다. 그는 1630년 8월 30일 영국 켄트 이스트웰에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 이스트웰 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Englan: St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. John Howse nasceu aproximadamente 1568, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Howse, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hinton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Lloyd aproximadamente 1588, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1610, sua profissão aparece como anglican minister-vicar em St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1630, em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Englan: ст мэри'с чурч, эаствелл, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev. John Howse родился около 1568 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Howse было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Hinton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Lloyd около 1588 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1610 году он работал по профессии anglican minister-vicar в местности ст мэри'с чурч, эаствелл, кэнт, Англия. Он умер 30 августа 1630 г. в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, эаствелл, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev. John Howse nació aproximadamente 1568, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Howse, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Hinton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Lloyd aproximadamente 1588, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1610, su ocupación registrada era anglican minister-vicar en St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1630, en Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra.
